Previous page Next page 1 About This Item 2 Pack of 6 of 2M Length 3 High-Quality Materials 4 Chunky Garland 5 Long Shiny Foil Decor How long is each tinsel garland? Each tinsel garland measures approximately 2 metres long, giving you plenty of length to decorate Christmas trees, staircases, mantels, or windows with ease. What material is the tinsel made from? The tinsel is made from durable, high-quality foil material designed to shimmer beautifully under lights, adding sparkle and festive charm to any space. Can the tinsel be reused every year? Yes, with proper care and storage, the tinsel garlands can be reused for multiple Christmas seasons, making them a cost-effective and eco-friendly decoration choice.
